headline: NetApp (NTAP) Could Be 4% Undervalued On NFL Partnership Buzz
summary: NetApp (NTAP) is back in the spotlight after being confirmed as Presenting Partner for the 2026 NFL Madrid and London Games, reinforcing its role as the league's Official Intelligent Data Infrastructure Partner. See our latest analysis for NetApp. Beyond the NFL partnership, NetApp has been drawing attention after being added to several Russell 1000 defensive indexes, with the share price at $165.78 and strong momentum reflected in the 90 day share price return of 66.66% and 1 year total...

headline: CGI Inc. (GIB) and NetApp Join Forces to Modernize IT Infrastructure and Improve Data Management
summary: CGI Inc (NYSE:GIB) is one of the best beaten-down technology stocks to buy now. headline: NetApp (NTAP) Stock Trades Near Fair Value Following Its 131% Run
summary: After a strong five year run that has seen NetApp deliver a 131.0% total return, the stock around US$165.78 now looks closer to its estimated intrinsic value on a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) basis, while earnings based multiples still indicate some undervaluation. Over the past 5 years, NetApp has returned 131.0%. This puts extra focus on whether the current price already reflects much of the company’s progress. For valuation, the key support is NetApp’s ability to convert earnings into cash...

headline: Does NetApp’s (NTAP) Triple Defensive Index Debut Reframe Its AI And Hybrid Cloud Story?
summary: On 27 June 2026, NetApp, Inc. was added to the Russell 1000 Growth-Defensive, Russell 1000 Defensive, and Russell 1000 Value-Defensive indices, broadening its presence across several style segments. This triple index inclusion could meaningfully increase NetApp’s visibility with institutional investors and passive funds that track Russell’s defensive and style-based benchmarks. We’ll now examine how NetApp’s addition to multiple Russell 1000 defensive-style indices might influence its...

headline: NetApp Named Presenting Partner of 2026 NFL Madrid Game
summary: MADRID, July 08, 2026--The NFL today announced that the league’s Global Partner, NetApp (NASDAQ: NTAP), the Intelligent Data Infrastructure company, will return as Presenting Partner of the 2026 NFL Madrid Game, featuring the Atlanta Falcons taking on the Cincinnati Bengals at the Bernabéu Stadium — home to Real Madrid C.F. — on Sunday, Nov. 8.
